sources.title: Two-year testing shows how PV plants increase local temperatures in semi-arid regions

Results show consistent site-scale warming of 0.8 C.

sources.title: Record solar, wind surge drives 3.3% drop in India’s fossil generation in 2025
sources.excerpt: India’s renewable power generation from solar, wind, hydro and bioenergy rose by a record 98 TWh (+24%) in 2025, driven by strong growth in solar and wind, according to Ember. As a result, India’s fossil power generation fell by 3.3%.

sources.excerpt: In a new weekly update for pv magazine, Solcast, a DNV company, provides a June–August 2026 outlook indicating mostly neutral to positive solar irradiance globally, with stronger gains in regions like Australasia, South Asia, West Africa, and Central America—patterns consistent with a developing El Niño.
